source: from pyspark.sql import functions as F

workspace = mssparkutils.env.getWorkspaceName()

if workspace == "pins-synw-odw-prod-uks":
    storage_account_name = "pinsstmpescproduksqz8bvk"
elif workspace == "pins-synw-odw-dev-uks":
    storage_account_name = "pinsstmpescdevuksw49hqz"
else:
    raise ValueError(f"Unknown workspace: {workspace}")

csv_base_path = f"abfss://mpesc@{storage_account_name}.dfs.core.windows.net/MPESC-SPREADSHEET/EXTRACT"
temp_path = f"abfss://mpesc@{storage_account_name}.dfs.core.windows.net/MPESC-SPREADSHEET/TEMP-CLEANUP"


print("Starting csv data cleanup process...")
print(f"csv path: {csv_base_path}")
print(f"temp path: {temp_path}")

def clean_csv_data(file_info):
    table_name = file_info["table_name"]
    csv_path = file_info["csv_path"]

    try:
        df = spark.read.option("header", True).option("inferSchema", False)\
            .csv(f"{csv_base_path}/{csv_path}")

        original_rows = df.count()
        original_cols = len(df.columns)

        # remove rows where row header (first column) is empty
        first_col = df.columns[0] if df.columns else None
        
        if first_col:
            # only remove rows where the first column (row header) is empty
            df_no_empty_rows = df.filter(
                (F.col(first_col).isNotNull()) & (F.col(first_col) != "")
            )
        else:
            df_no_empty_rows = df

        # remove columns only if header is empty/autogenerated
        columns_to_keep = []

        for col_name in df_no_empty_rows.columns:
            is_empty_header = (
                col_name is None or
                col_name.strip() == "" or
                col_name.startswith("Unnamed:") or
                col_name.startswith("_c") or
                col_name.startswith("Column") or
                col_name in ["null", "NULL"]
            )

            if not is_empty_header:
                columns_to_keep.append(col_name)
            else:
                print(f"Removing column (empty/autogenerated header): {table_name}.{col_name}")

        cleaned_df = (
            df_no_empty_rows.select(columns_to_keep)
            if columns_to_keep else df_no_empty_rows
        )

        cleaned_rows = cleaned_df.count()
        cleaned_cols = len(cleaned_df.columns)

        temp_output_path = f"{temp_path}/{table_name}"

        spark.catalog.clearCache()

        # write cleaned file to temp path
        cleaned_df.coalesce(1) \
            .write.mode("overwrite") \
            .option("header", True) \
            .csv(temp_output_path)

        original_path = f"{csv_base_path}/{csv_path}"

        # remove original file
        try:
            mssparkutils.fs.rm(original_path, True)
        except:
            pass

        # copy cleaned file back
        temp_files = mssparkutils.fs.ls(temp_output_path)
        part_file = [f.path for f in temp_files if "part-" in f.name][0]

        mssparkutils.fs.cp(part_file, original_path)

        # cleanup temp folder
        mssparkutils.fs.rm(temp_output_path, True)

        print(
            f"{table_name}: "
            f"{original_rows:,} -> {cleaned_rows:,} rows, "
            f"{original_cols} -> {cleaned_cols} cols"
        )

        return {
            "table_name": table_name,
            "original_rows": original_rows,
            "cleaned_rows": cleaned_rows,
            "original_cols": original_cols,
            "cleaned_cols": cleaned_cols,
            "rows_removed": original_rows - cleaned_rows,
            "cols_removed": original_cols - cleaned_cols
        }

    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Error: {table_name}: {str(e)}")
        return {
            "table_name": table_name,
            "error": str(e)

print(f"\n Cleaning {len(csv_files)} files...\n")
results = [clean_csv_data(f) for f in csv_files]
print("Cleanup completed")

success = [r for r in results if "error" not in r]
failed = [r for r in results if "error" in r]

print(f"Files processed: {len(csv_files)}")
print(f"Success: {len(success)}")
print(f"Failed: {len(failed)}")

# final temp cleanup
try:
    mssparkutils.fs.rm(temp_path, True)
    print("\ntemp directory cleaned")
except:
    print("\ntemp cleanup skipped")

print(f"\nCleaned files saved to: {csv_base_path}")
